---
title: "Python Packages 4 : Testing"
author: "nshephard"
date: "2022-11-30"
categories: [code, analysis, python, packages, packaging, git, github, gitlab]
image: https://live.staticflickr.com/6127/6022481682_ea01737b19_k.jpg
---

This is the fourth in a series of posts about Python Packaging and covers writing unit and regression tests for your
package.

# Links

* [pytest](https://docs.pytest.org/en/latest/)

## PyTest Extensions

* [pytest-cov](https://github.com/pytest-dev/pytest-cov)
* [pytest-mpl](https://github.com/matplotlib/pytest-mpl)
* [pytest-regtest](https://gitlab.com/uweschmitt/pytest-regtest)
* [pytest-xdist](https://github.com/pytest-dev/pytest-xdist)
